name: test_archive_unmatched_consent_response_removes_from_list
description:
Test: Archive an unmatched consent response and verify it is removed from the list.
Steps:
1. Select a child from the unmatched consent responses.
2. Click the archive button and provide notes.
Verification:
- Archived alert is visible.
- The consent response for the child is no longer visible in the unmatched list.
descriptionHtml:
Test: Archive an unmatched consent response and verify it is removed from the list.
Steps:

  1. Select a child from the unmatched consent responses.
  2. Click the archive button and provide notes.
    Verification:
  • Archived alert is visible.
  • The consent response for the child is no longer visible in the unmatched list.
statusMessage:
AssertionError: Locator expected to be visible
Actual value: None
Error: element(s) not found 
Call log:
  - Expect "to_be_visible" with timeout 5000ms
  - waiting for get_by_role("link", name="Aaron Skinner")
statusTrace:
give_online_consent = None, go_to_unmatched_consent_responses = None
page = <Page url='https://qa.mavistesting.com/consent-forms'>
children = {'HPV': [Child(first_name='Bradley', last_name='GREGORY', nhs_number='9562646254', address=('Flat 6', 'Emily Manors', ...(full_name='Katie Parkinson-Savage', relationship=<Relationship.MUM: 'Mum'>, email_address='jayharris@example.net')))]}

    def test_archive_unmatched_consent_response_removes_from_list(
        give_online_consent,
        go_to_unmatched_consent_responses,
        page,
        children,
    ):
        """
        Test: Archive an unmatched consent response and verify it is removed from the list.
        Steps:
        1. Select a child from the unmatched consent responses.
        2. Click the archive button and provide notes.
        Verification:
        - Archived alert is visible.
        - The consent response for the child is no longer visible in the unmatched list.
        """
        child = children[Programme.HPV][0]
>       UnmatchedConsentResponsesPage(page).click_parent_on_consent_record_for_child(child)
